task_completion.description: Connect to the Chinook database in DBeaver
task_completion.visual_evidence: DBeaver application is open with 'chinook.db' visible and connected in the Database Navigator panel.

task_completion.description: Create the 'employee_badges' table with the required schema
task_completion.visual_evidence: DBeaver SQL editor or Table Properties showing the creation of 'employee_badges' with columns: BadgeId (PK), EmployeeId (FK), BadgeData (BLOB), and IssueDate (Text).

task_completion.description: Insert a record for EmployeeId 1 and IssueDate '2024-01-01'
task_completion.visual_evidence: DBeaver Data Grid or SQL INSERT statement showing a new row with EmployeeId '1' and IssueDate '2024-01-01' in the employee_badges table.

task_completion.description: Load the source image into the BadgeData BLOB column
task_completion.visual_evidence: DBeaver Value Panel, BLOB editor, or file selection dialog showing the file '/usr/share/dbeaver-ce/dbeaver.png' being loaded into the BadgeData cell.

task_completion.description: Export the BLOB image to the verified_badge.png path
task_completion.visual_evidence: DBeaver 'Save as' dialog or file manager showing the BLOB content being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/verified_badge.png'.

task_completion.description: Save the SQL CREATE TABLE statement to badge_schema.sql
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or DBeaver 'Save SQL script' dialog showing the CREATE TABLE statement being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/badge_schema.sql'.

integrity.description: Agent used DBeaver GUI for database operations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the DBeaver graphical interface to create the table and manage the BLOB, rather than exclusively using the sqlite3 CLI in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent exported the BLOB from the database rather than copying the file directly
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use DBeaver's BLOB export/save functionality. There should be no terminal commands like 'cp /usr/share/dbeaver-ce/dbeaver.png /home/ga/Documents/exports/verified_badge.png' used to bypass the database.

integrity.description: Agent saved the actual CREATE TABLE statement
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'badge_schema.sql' should contain a valid SQL CREATE TABLE statement matching the schema requirements, not just placeholder text or copied task instructions.
